mapper.select:
SELECT arc.id, arc.user_id, u.username, arc.name, arc.description, arc.persona_prompt, arc.is_public, arc.deleted, arc.create_time, arc.update_time FROM api_relay_config arc LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON arc.user_id = u.id WHERE arc.deleted = 0
AND arc.user_id = #{userId}
AND (arc.user_id = #{userId} OR arc.is_public = 1)
ORDER BY arc.create_time DESC
